comment.body:
options market is not the only market ;))
i will write a new educational post, bcs I see ppl getting lost in options a lot. thanks to greek furus.
thats why i haven't started my educational post series yet about greeks, bcs i want to make you see that the market is bigger than BSM model.

it is all about structure. have you every seen a liquidity heatmap before? that that like Bookmap presents? 
Now, what options market is doing is that it BETS on liquidity... they bet on what they expect to be realized. 
option can bet on time and volatility. thats the key. 
here volatility is how fast the spot moves basically.

comment.body:
imagine markets like a constant auction.
in the order book you can see the auction going on.
there are price levels that the market participants prefer more... high volume there, price spend more times there, more liquidity, lower local volatility.
and there are areas/levels that the market is not interested in, and the spot simply jumps through them... lower volume, lower liquidity there, higher local realized vol.
comment.raw_body:
